run: 2026-07-19 NRP ssu-atlas-ai, 4 shard-servers (cpu=2/6Gi each) over nats://atlas-nats:4222, coordinator in-cluster (cpu=4/8Gi)
corpus: 1,000,000,000 rows, dim 32 -> PCA 24 -> 4-bit v3 (24.01 B/row hot tier, 4x ~6.0 GB Linstor RWO)
cold_store: 200 per-shard fp32 .npy on CephFS RWX (128 GB)
notes: servers_touched=4/4: round-robin shard placement puts every cell on every server; routing sparsity requires cell-aligned placement (future run)
rerank wall dominated by CephFS random fetch across 200 shard files; batch-per-shard fetch is the obvious optimization
distributed build: 4x250M rows in ~31 min wall (vs 77 min single-node v2 at 1B)
true_recall vs fp32 ground truth of 100 queries; recall_vs_adc_fullscan vs the exact distributed ADC full-scan merge
